seoTitle: Connect ManyChat with ActiveCampaign via Zapier
metaDescription: Bridge ManyChat automation with ActiveCampaign using Zapier so chat leads sync into your CRM lists and tags without manual exports.
intro: Conversational leads from ManyChat don't do much good if they stay trapped in your chatbot. This guide shows how to connect ManyChat to ActiveCampaign through Zapier, capturing new tagged users or form submissions and pushing them into ActiveCampaign as contacts with the right tags, without creating duplicates.

steps.heading: Start a new Zap with ManyChat as the trigger
steps.body: Create a new Zap and choose ManyChat as your trigger application.

steps.heading: Authenticate and pick your trigger event
steps.body: Connect your ManyChat account securely and select an event like a new tagged user or form submission.

steps.heading: Test the trigger with live data
steps.body: Pull in fresh test customer data to confirm chat variables are matching correctly inside Zapier.

steps.heading: Add ActiveCampaign as your action
steps.body: Set the action step to "Create or Update Contact" in ActiveCampaign so existing contacts aren't duplicated.

steps.heading: Map contact fields
steps.body: Match first name, email address, phone number, and custom tags from ManyChat into ActiveCampaign's contact fields.

steps.heading: Test and publish
steps.body: Run the end-to-end test to confirm data flows correctly, then publish your Zap.

faq.question: Will this create duplicate contacts in ActiveCampaign?
faq.answer: No, the action step uses "Create or Update Contact," which is designed to update existing records instead of duplicating them.

faq.question: What ManyChat events can trigger this Zap?
faq.answer: You can trigger on events like a new tagged user or a new form submission inside ManyChat.

faq.question: Can I automatically tag contacts in ActiveCampaign?
faq.answer: Yes, custom contact tags can be mapped from your ManyChat data into ActiveCampaign as part of the field mapping.

faq.question: Do I need a paid Zapier plan for this integration?
faq.answer: The tutorial doesn't specify a required plan, so check whether ManyChat and ActiveCampaign are available on your current Zapier tier.
